name: AgentMetrics
description: 360-degree observability for every OpenClaw agent - tokens, tools, latency, cost, subagents, context health, and reliability.

apiKey.description: AgentMetrics API key (overrides AGENTMETRICS_API_KEY env var)

enabled.description: Master toggle - set to false to disable all telemetry without uninstalling (default: true)

flushIntervalSeconds.description: How often to flush the event batch to the API in seconds (default: 10)

maxBatchSize.description: Maximum number of events per batch request (default: 100)

maxQueueSize.description: Maximum number of events to hold in the local queue before dropping (FIFO, default: 10000)

retryMaxAttempts.description: Maximum retry attempts per event batch before moving to dead-letter queue (default: 5)

redactionMode.description: Redaction policy: strict = all sensitive fields scrubbed (default); moderate = errors and secrets only; debug = opt-in full detail, auto-expires after 1h

toolNameExport.description: How tool names are exported: blocklist = export all except redactToolNames (default); allowlist = export only listed; hash = pseudonymise; off = never export

redactToolNames.description: Tool names to always redact regardless of toolNameExport mode (default: [])

compressPayloads.description: Gzip-compress batch payloads before sending (requires server-side Content-Encoding: gzip support, default: false)
